summary: Positive listening experience of the June 3 1995 show; recording quality not detailed but overall enjoyable.
review: The reviewer gave the concert a solid four‑star rating and recalled having a great time at the three‑day run, indicating an enjoyable performance. No specific comments were made about the audio source or mix, so the technical quality remains unclear beyond the listener’s general satisfaction.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review (4 ★) with limited detail; positive sentiment suggests a decent show, but lack of technical commentary keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on soundboard vs. audience or clarity; overall impression is neutral to positive.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer mentioned a great time over the three‑day event but gave no specific musical analysis.
